case_title: JACOB SHIKH VS. BAKE EXPRESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-16-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAKE EXPRESS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAKE EXPRESS, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIKH, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT BAKE EXPRESS, INC.

DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIKH, JACOB

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-29-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JACOB SHIKH. DEFENDANT BAKE EXPRESS INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIKH, JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKE EXPRESS, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TUON QUACH, OWNER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT RETAINS RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIKH, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT BAKE EXPRESS, INC.
DECLARATION OF JACOB SHIKH RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIKH, JACOB
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-22-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-29-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 29, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT,PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
